evidence_scope: Same N-MNIST test trajectories; exploratory upper-bound and cross-validated post-hoc evidence, not independent confirmation.
limitations: The oracle uses ground-truth labels and is not deployable.
The gate diagnostic reuses the previously observed N-MNIST test trajectories.
Grouped cross-validation prevents sample leakage but does not create independent test evidence.
No threshold or model from this analysis should be treated as a finalized deployment choice.
A future method-development experiment must train and calibrate the gate using training/validation data and evaluate once on an untouched test set.

oracle_best_candidate.normalized_prefix_auc_definition: arithmetic mean of prefix accuracy percentages
